textByHash.00026ddce0e4551662ecb704d920259857dabf70: Well, I suppose if you've already nosily rifled through the princesses personal memoirs, I can tell you a little more.
textByHash.02f33945e8f60fa4dcc5f29e55ba29e097cee342: I'm sorry adventurer, but what does this prove exactly? For all you know someone else wrote this to mislead you.
textByHash.137c9c8bb78e2401a6db853a4a071805d931ae87: I do very much miss her, but one can't change the past.
textByHash.15605ed50fd0405dee7bdd3581c2920d77ce2312: I'm Alyssa the housekeeper and this castle needs constant attention! I've enough trouble with the guards messing up my carpets without you adding to the problem.
textByHash.17f0b073369a5c41d88df4774c05cb90131e4a52: Are all adventurers as dense as you? If you were in danger, do you really think leaving a hidden message in an old lost book for any stranger to pick up is the best way to get help?
textByHash.238cd7e600af2a4e21c7a2118ed1817bb93c7ace: Alright, believe what you like. I've a castle to clean.
textByHash.4ded4b363873dbaedad540188295f897d0590148: Why should I tell you anything? There are private matters of a late royal family! It wouldn't be proper to divulge such information to an adventurer like you.
textByHash.5173926f77866dcb27c7efede5d7492d83ab4728: Indeed, and poor young Rose was shipped off and labelled as crazy.
textByHash.5a7f1ee5203a9d236ed7b30715eeb21bd5501a7a: How very nice of you. However, I'm sure there are less busy people who'd love to chat.
textByHash.76f34a31147fca5647dfccdaa4792a94c3b16f6e: Yes, how did you come across this? I'm fairly certain it was destroyed... At least, I recall seeing a man removing the pages...
textByHash.82ffb875ab0ec520106447770ba6c1cb7f96cf74: Chin up love and go adventure, that's what you lot do right?
textByHash.8c8ea8f92f20dce7382d570511114ff5a9b1b85d: If she did write this I'm afraid to say she must be mad after all.
textByHash.95fc3988db52dee9ff38745de07daf14505fb8fc: Yes, I do indeed. Off with you, I've had my fair share of nosy adventurers for one day.
textByHash.ad9725f72e177a2c680c8dd82d266ebbd849ea62: It's cut to fit! If I had a gold piece for everytime I was asked that question!
textByHash.b575a074b16b3e161f0b1ebd55904c06cf915e97: Yes, yes, of course. Well, I'd be glad to hear of her being safe but perhaps you should heed the warning.
textByHash.ba534c7a361f5813be8288d2dbbbd0fadf0b1be6: I'm sorry, but I'm not paid to serve every lazy adventurer who walks their dirty feet through my halls!
textByHash.d012ea7fade9c1102dee6bc233bcfbea605eaf79: Well, if I were you I'd keep shush on the whole matter.
textByHash.de633662b26bf22aaf5736869c183dc2f16e4bad: Hello, if you've something important to tell me, be out with it! I'm a busy woman.
textByHash.e72f09c3d254981a7cbc98d882207bb5ef3603ee: You must be new here. When the king died, everyone assumed the princess would take the throne when she came of age.
textByHash.fcf823f01cb525ef880b7ff0ac85cafa3f10da7a: Alright, spring the trap! Don't come crying to me when it all turns sour.
